brand.name: Stoutwood Studios
brand.niche: create new original designs made of reclaimed wood from questionable sources!

target_audience.who: homeowners who want their environment to say something about themselves, totally unique.
target_audience.pain: they want their environment to stand out as completely unique, knowing that there's only ever gonna be that one piece. no identicals.

audio.note: Voice is always the primary signal. The bed is background texture only.
